title: TruthSurface
description: A signed, Merkle-addressed truth summary emitted by a plane (system/user/agent/witness). This is an interoperability artifact: it references existing governance/provenance objects, it does not replace them.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this surface was produced.

merkleRoot.description: Merkle root over referenced artifacts (format is producer-defined; commonly sha256:<hex>).

signer.description: Logical signer identity (key or service name).

signature.description: Cryptographic signature over the canonicalized surface payload.

refs.description: Pointers to existing governance/provenance objects and evidence bundles.

evidence.description: Evidence completeness panel. Producers should keep this summary aligned with the policy pack expectations.

semantics.description: Governed meaning summary: anchors/topics/glossary bindings. Shape may evolve; keep stable keys where possible.

runtime.description: Runtime truth summary (process/thread/namespace/capability posture). Shape may evolve; keep stable keys where possible.

governance.description: Governance posture summary (approvals, risk score, obligations satisfied, policy pack digest).
